# NOTE: the eDP-1 EDID below is synthetic, not real hardware (hashes to
# 7f43020e9adaddcd via bspwm/lib/edid.py). The tracked profiles pin real
# hardware hashes, so they never match this fixture; tests that need the
# pin to match (test_coordinator's EDID-resolution test) re-pin a profile
# copy to this fixture's hash at runtime. Don't run redact-edid.py over
# this file: it would replace the block with an all-zero dummy and change
# the hash tests compute from it.
Screen 0: minimum 320 x 200, current 1920 x 1080, maximum 16384 x 16384
